7 days. If you don't feel the shift, it's free.
settings.text: Do the reset for a week. If your head isn't clearer and your days don't feel better, email us and get every cent back — no forms, no awkward questions. The only risk is staying foggy.

settings.note:
I'm not a doctor or some productivity guru. I'm a normal guy who got tired of waking up and reaching for my phone before I'd even opened both eyes.

I felt foggy, flat, and weirdly bored of everything — and deep down I knew the scrolling was the reason. So I read everything I could, tested it on myself, and put what actually worked into a simple 7-day plan.

This is that plan. It's the thing I wish someone had handed me. If it helps you feel a bit more like yourself again, it did its job.
settings.name: Jack

settings.q: How do I get access after paying?
settings.a: The moment Shopify confirms your payment you're auto-redirected straight to Day 1 — no email, no waiting.
No. It's a structured 7-day protocol with a daily action, craving tools and a real-dopamine menu. Deleting apps alone doesn't rewire anything — this does.
About 10 minutes. It's built for real life, not a monastery.

settings.a: 7-day money-back guarantee, no questions asked. You risk nothing.
No — once-off payment. The R299 option adds lifetime top-ups, but even that's a single payment.

settings.title: Tap buy — pay once, securely
settings.text: R199, one payment, through Shopify's secure checkout. No subscription, no card tricks, no shipping — it's instant digital access.

settings.title: Land straight on Day 1
settings.text: The second your payment clears you're taken right into your member dashboard on Day 1. No email hunting, no access codes, no waiting around.

settings.title: Do one simple daily action
settings.text: Open the app, do that day's 10-minute action, tick it off. Stuck on a craving? The urge-surfing tools beat it in under 90 seconds.

settings.title: Feel the fog start to lift
settings.text: Your streak builds, your focus sharpens, and small things start feeling good again. The tracker shows your mood and momentum climbing.

settings.title: Keep your tools for life
settings.text: Finish the 7 days a different person — and keep lifetime access to every protocol, the tracker and all future updates to come back to whenever you need a reset.

settings.title: Built like a slot machine
settings.text: Feeds run on unpredictable, variable rewards — the same design that makes gambling hard to put down.

settings.title: Wanting isn't liking
settings.text: Dopamine drives the urge to seek more, not the pleasure itself. That's why you can scroll for an hour and still feel empty.

settings.title: To refocus after a ping
settings.text: Research on attention suggests it takes the average person around 23 minutes to fully refocus after a single distraction.

settings.title: Your brain bounces back
settings.text: The reward system is plastic. Lower the flood of stimulation and your baseline starts recovering — often within days.
